title: Base Chain Fundamentals
subtitle: The L2 Powering Supercompute
description: Understand Base — Coinbase's L2 built on the OP Stack. Learn how it works, why it matters, and how to build on it. Gas fees, bridging, sequencers, and the Base ecosystem.

lessons.title: What is Base?
lessons.description: Base architecture, the OP Stack, and Coinbase's role as sequencer.

lessons.title: Bridging to Base
lessons.description: How to move assets from Ethereum to Base — official bridge vs third-party.
lessons.topics: Official bridge, Third-party bridges, Bridge risk, Gas costs

lessons.title: Gas on Base
lessons.description: How gas works on L2, why it's cheaper, and optimization techniques.
lessons.topics: Gas fees, EIP-1559, L1 data costs, Calldata optimization

lessons.title: Base Ecosystem
lessons.description: Key protocols and projects building on Base — Aerodrome, Uniswap, Compound, and more.
lessons.topics: Aerodrome, Uniswap V3, Compound, Base ecosystem map

lessons.title: Building on Base
lessons.description: Developer tooling, RPC endpoints, testnets, and deployment patterns for Base.
lessons.topics: RPC endpoints, Base Sepolia, Hardhat/Foundry, Deployment scripts

lessons.title: Base vs Other L2s
lessons.description: Comparing Base to Arbitrum, Optimism, zkSync — trade-offs and use cases.
